description: Grass — a warm storybook-green base (#3f5f2e) with The Ground pack's sparse blade-dither overlay on top (public/assets/tilemaps/ground.png, the ~67-alpha scatter at cells 0-1×0-1). The Ground's top rows are transparency-dither overlays meant to sit on a base color (NOT solid grass), so the tile composites baseColor THEN the cropped overlay — real PNG texture over a clean readable base, replacing the POC .pix grass. The field samples a 2×2 cell block so the scatter tiles seamlessly.
